title: No Title
summary: The Foster Foundation grants process has changed to by invitation only. Organizations must meet eligibility criteria and complete Organization Information Form to be considered for funding.
llm_eligibility: Have current 501(c)(3) status from the Internal Revenue Service.
Be located in or serve populations of the Pacific Northwest which includes Washington, Oregon, Idaho, Montana and Alaska.
Address as your mission or project intent one of The Foster Foundation's Priority Issues for funding.
Not have any delinquent final reports due to the Foundation from previous grant cycles.
eligibility_signals: nonprofit; 501(c)(3); organization; eligible; must be; requirements
